title: "A time of every danger": the 2026 World Cup breaks all sports betting records, and addiction specialists have never been more worried

news.title: "A time of every danger": the 2026 World Cup breaks all sports betting records, and addiction specialists have never been more worried

world.title: "A time of every danger": the 2026 World Cup breaks all sports betting records, and addiction specialists have never been more worried

environment.compositionIntent: All-over Mancoba-derived matte paper surround: warm earth planes, black contour anchors, counted dot routes, hatching, partial arcs, and a central pressure knot translating World Cup betting danger without literal sports imagery.

distanceSafety.reason: Canonical public camera retained until preview evidence requires otherwise.

contrast.notes: Warm matte-paper light preserves stained ochre/violet fields; restrained teal rim separates cool counterpoints and black route marks without glow effects.

guidance: Use for painted, paper, canvas, ink wash, graphite, stain, and transfer surfaces.
Represent texture through declarative surface controls and WebGPU-safe texture descriptors.
Use for all-over color fields, hard-edged planes, atmospheric bands, and flat graphic fields.
Prefer geometry layers or declarative texture descriptors over GLSL gradients.
Use for soft atmosphere, dust, floating pigment, and particulate halos.
Keep the particle logic deterministic and inspectable in data.
Use for WebGPU-safe color grading and output transforms.
Do not use legacy GLSL post passes for WebGPU project scenes.

params.compositionUse: Dominant surrounding matte-paper shell and far all-over field; kept rooted at the origin to preserve camera-pinned environment behavior and accepted WebGPU evidence.

workshopAcceptance: check-part-draft succeeded with validation.pass true and no errors for drafts/world-environment.module.mjs.
Attempt 3 Playwright desktop preview captured successfully with healthStatus ok and captureStatus ok.

Attempt 3 screenshot shows a dominant pale matte-paper surround with black arcs, hatching, dotted betting-pressure routes, ochre/violet/teal geometric planes, and a central dark vertical pressure knot tied to the Mancoba/world-cup-betting brief.
Attempt 3 render metrics: nonBlankRatio 0.999885, dynamicRange 228.333, foregroundOccupancyRatio 0.347415, centerForegroundRatio 0.456788.
evidence.selfReview: Accepted environment preserved as the full-surround field; final composition uses it as the ground, vertical pressure axis, and far arc/dot system.

compositionCompatibility.note: Composition only adjusts world fields, camera, lighting, outputColorTransform, and part params; accepted WebGPU-compatible module refs are preserved.

compositionAdaptations: Kept at origin as the full-surround matte paper environment; uses warm paper lighting and canonical camera for accepted skybox/field behavior.
composition modified world-environment from isolated accepted-part defaults

params.compositionUse: Close central knot and branching betting-pressure routes; reduced from isolated scale so black strokes intensify the field without swallowing the environment axis.

workshopAcceptance: Inspected the available local concept reference image directly: broad pale paper field, ochre fragments, black arcs/lines, hatching, dot routes, and central knot were used only as advisory palette/density/mood cues.
Static check passed for drafts/non-literal-fracture-pressure.module.mjs with validation.pass true and no errors.
Playwright desktop preview attempt 2 succeeded with healthStatus ok and captureStatus ok.

Preview showed a readable abstract primary-news-signal: enlarged warm paper fracture planes, a compressed black vertical axis and central knot, branching route lines, arcs, hatching clusters, teal/rust counterpoints, and repeated dot marks carrying concentrated World Cup betting pressure without literal subject matter.
Renderer compatibility package report found WebGPU-compatible standard material surfaces with MeshBasicMaterial and LineBasicMaterial and no forbidden shader surfaces.
evidence.selfReview: Accepted pressure signal preserved and placed as a near, readable non-literal danger knot with diagonal routes and repeated marks.

params.compositionUse: Offset midground mark system adds all-over Mancoba hatching, rubbed planes, glyph stains, and dot routes around the primary knot while leaving pale margins readable.

workshopAcceptance: Attempt 2 Playwright desktop preview succeeded with healthStatus ok and captureStatus ok.

Attempt 2 screenshot shows a readable Mancoba-style artist mark field in isolation: broad pale paper planes, ochre/violet/teal/rust stains, black contour strokes, hatch ladders, radial arcs, dot routes, and a discreet central axis carrying non-literal World Cup betting pressure.
Static draft validation passed with no bundle errors.
evidence.selfReview: Accepted artist-style system preserved and offset into midground to thicken hand-drawn mark density without competing as a second subject.
